timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: SpaceX is founded
description: Elon Musk founds Space Exploration Technologies Corp. to develop lower-cost launch vehicles and spacecraft.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Falcon 1 is introduced
description: SpaceX publicly presents Falcon 1 as its first orbital launch vehicle for small payloads.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: NASA awards COTS funding
description: NASA selects SpaceX for the Commercial Orbital Transportation Services program, backing development of cargo capabilities for the ISS.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Falcon 1 reaches orbit
description: Falcon 1 becomes the first privately developed liquid-fueled rocket to reach Earth orbit.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: SpaceX wins CRS cargo contract
description: NASA awards SpaceX a Commercial Resupply Services contract for cargo flights to the International Space Station.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Falcon 9 makes first flight
description: The larger Falcon 9 rocket launches successfully for the first time.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Dragon returns from orbit
description: Dragon becomes the first privately developed spacecraft to reach orbit and return safely to Earth.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Dragon reaches the ISS
description: Dragon becomes the first commercial spacecraft to berth with the International Space Station.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Grasshopper test program advances reusability
description: Low-altitude Grasshopper flights demonstrate controlled vertical takeoff and landing technologies for reusable boosters.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: First Falcon 9 booster landing
description: A Falcon 9 first stage lands successfully at Landing Zone 1 after launch, proving orbital-class booster recovery on land.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: First droneship landing succeeds
description: SpaceX lands a Falcon 9 booster on an autonomous droneship at sea for the first time.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: First reused orbital booster flies
description: A previously flown Falcon 9 first stage launches and lands again, marking a major reusability milestone.
location: Kennedy Space Center, Florida, United States

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Falcon Heavy debuts
description: SpaceX launches Falcon Heavy on its maiden flight, briefly becoming the world's most powerful operational rocket.
location: Kennedy Space Center, Florida, United States

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Starlink satellite launches begin
description: SpaceX starts deploying the Starlink broadband constellation, expanding into satellite internet services.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Crew Dragon launches Demo-2
description: SpaceX carries NASA astronauts to orbit on Demo-2, the first crewed orbital mission launched by a private company.
location: Kennedy Space Center, Florida, United States

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Crew-1 starts operational crew service
description: SpaceX begins regular operational crew transport missions to the ISS under NASA's Commercial Crew Program.
location: Kennedy Space Center, Florida, United States

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Inspiration4 becomes first all-civilian orbital mission
description: SpaceX flies the Inspiration4 mission, the first orbital spaceflight crewed entirely by private citizens.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Starship testing accelerates in Texas
description: SpaceX completes major booster and ship test campaigns ahead of integrated orbital Starship flights.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Starship makes first integrated test flight
description: The fully stacked Starship and Super Heavy system flies for the first time, beginning a new phase of heavy-lift development.

timeline_description: A timeline of SpaceX from its founding through its major launch, spacecraft, and reusability milestones.
title: Super Heavy booster is caught by launch tower
description: SpaceX demonstrates a tower catch of the returning Super Heavy booster during Starship test operations.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix is founded
description: Reed Hastings and Marc Randolph found Netflix as an online movie-rental company.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix launches its website
description: The company begins offering DVD rentals through an online storefront.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Subscription model begins
description: Netflix introduces a subscription service that helps distinguish it from traditional video-rental stores.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Cinematch recommendation system gains importance
description: Netflix expands its recommendation technology to personalize viewing choices for customers.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix goes public
description: Netflix completes its initial public offering on Nasdaq, giving the company wider access to capital.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: First profit is reported
description: Netflix posts its first full-year profit as its DVD-by-mail model scales.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Membership rises into the millions
description: Netflix reaches a multi-million subscriber base, confirming the strength of the mail-order rental model.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Streaming service launches
description: Netflix debuts streaming video, beginning its transformation from DVD rentals to on-demand digital entertainment.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Streaming reaches consumer devices
description: Netflix expands streaming access through connected televisions, game consoles, and set-top devices.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix expands to Canada
description: The company begins international streaming expansion with its launch in Canada.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Service enters Latin America and the Caribbean
description: Netflix continues global expansion across dozens of markets in Latin America and the Caribbean.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: First original series premieres
description: Netflix begins original programming with titles such as Lilyhammer, reducing dependence on licensed content.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: House of Cards accelerates originals strategy
description: The success of House of Cards helps establish Netflix as a major commissioner and distributor of original series.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Expansion reaches major European markets
description: Netflix enters additional European countries, widening its international footprint.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix launches in most of the world
description: Netflix announces service availability in more than 130 additional countries in a single global expansion.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Subscriber base passes 100 million
description: Netflix surpasses 100 million subscribers worldwide, cementing its leadership in streaming video.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix strengthens its awards presence
description: The company becomes a major force in film awards through original productions such as Roma and later releases.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Membership passes 200 million
description: A surge in home viewing during the COVID-19 era helps Netflix exceed 200 million subscribers worldwide.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Netflix enters mobile gaming
description: Netflix adds games to its service, extending the platform beyond film and television.

timeline_description: A timeline of Netflix from its DVD-rental origins to its rise as a global streaming and production company.
title: Ad-supported tier launches
description: Netflix introduces a lower-priced plan with advertising as it adjusts its business model to slower growth.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung is founded
description: Lee Byung-chul establishes Samsung as a trading business in Taegu during the late colonial period in Korea.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung enters textiles
description: The group opens a major woolen mill and expands into manufacturing in postwar South Korea.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung Electronics is established
description: Samsung launches Samsung Electronics, creating the business that becomes the center of the group's global identity.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: First Samsung television is produced
description: Samsung Electronics manufactures its first black-and-white television set.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Television exports begin
description: Samsung starts exporting television sets, an early step in its international electronics expansion.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung enters semiconductors
description: The company acquires Korea Semiconductor, establishing a base in chip manufacturing.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung expands into telecommunications
description: Samsung broadens its electronics portfolio by moving into telecommunications equipment and devices.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: 64K DRAM is developed
description: Samsung produces a 64-kilobit dynamic random-access memory chip, strengthening its semiconductor ambitions.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Leadership passes to Lee Kun-hee
description: After the death of founder Lee Byung-chul, Lee Kun-hee becomes the central leader of Samsung's next phase.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung Electronics expands globally
description: Samsung Electronics emerges as a stronger global company following corporate reorganization and international expansion.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung becomes a leading memory-chip maker
description: The company reaches the top tier of the global DRAM market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: New Management initiative is announced
description: Lee Kun-hee launches a quality-focused reform program that reshapes Samsung's culture and product strategy.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung introduces digital television advances
description: Samsung accelerates its push into digital consumer electronics as global demand shifts from analog products.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung becomes the top global TV brand
description: Samsung rises to the top of the worldwide television market, a position it sustains for years.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Galaxy branding expands
description: Samsung begins building the Galaxy line into a major smartphone and mobile-computing brand.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Galaxy S launches
description: The Galaxy S smartphone line becomes central to Samsung's challenge to Apple in the global handset market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung reaches peak smartphone scale
description: The company consolidates its place among the world's largest smartphone manufacturers.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Galaxy Note7 recall hits the company
description: Samsung recalls the Galaxy Note7 after battery fires, creating one of the biggest product crises in its history.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Foldable phones enter the lineup
description: Samsung commercializes foldable smartphone designs, opening a new premium mobile category.

timeline_description: A timeline of Samsung from its origins as a Korean trading company to its emergence as a global electronics and semiconductor giant.
title: Samsung begins 3nm chip production
description: Samsung announces mass production using 3-nanometer process technology, underscoring its foundry ambitions.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyoda automatic loom is completed
description: Sakichi Toyoda's automatic loom becomes the technological and financial foundation for the future automobile business.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Loom patent is sold abroad
description: The sale of the automatic loom patent provides capital that helps finance automobile development.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Automobile division is created
description: Toyoda Automatic Loom Works establishes an automobile division under Kiichiro Toyoda.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Type A engine is completed
description: Toyota finishes the Type A engine, a key step toward full vehicle production.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: G1 truck is launched
description: Toyota's first production vehicle, the G1 truck, enters the market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Model AA passenger car appears
description: Toyota releases its first passenger car, the Model AA sedan.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyota Motor Co. is incorporated
description: The automobile division becomes Toyota Motor Company, Ltd.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyota faces a postwar crisis
description: A financial crisis and labor dispute force restructuring, shaping Toyota's later management system.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Land Cruiser lineage begins
description: Toyota develops the BJ utility vehicle, the direct precursor of the Land Cruiser.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Crown exports to the United States
description: Toyota begins exporting the Crown to the U.S., an early milestone in overseas expansion.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Motomachi Plant opens
description: Toyota opens the Motomachi Plant, which becomes one of its best-known manufacturing sites.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Corolla is launched
description: The Corolla debuts and goes on to become one of the best-selling car models in history.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Oil shock raises demand for efficient cars
description: Toyota's small, fuel-efficient vehicles gain greater appeal during the global oil crisis.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyota Motor Corporation is formed
description: Toyota Motor Company and Toyota Motor Sales merge into Toyota Motor Corporation.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: NUMMI joint venture begins
description: Toyota and General Motors launch the NUMMI manufacturing venture in California.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Lexus brand is launched
description: Toyota introduces Lexus to compete in the global luxury-car market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Prius enters production
description: Toyota launches the Prius, pioneering mass-market hybrid motoring.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyota reaches the top of global auto sales
description: Toyota overtakes General Motors in annual vehicle sales, reflecting decades of international growth.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Mirai fuel-cell car is launched
description: Toyota commercializes the Mirai, one of the first mass-produced hydrogen fuel-cell cars.

timeline_description: A timeline of Toyota from its loom-making origins to its rise as one of the world's largest automakers.
title: Toyota regains the global sales lead
description: Toyota returns to the top position among the world's automakers by vehicle sales.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: CTR is incorporated
description: The Computing-Tabulating-Recording Company is formed through the merger of three office-equipment businesses.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Thomas J. Watson Sr. joins the company
description: Watson becomes the dominant executive figure who reshapes the company and its sales culture.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Company is renamed IBM
description: CTR adopts the name International Business Machines Corporation.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: IBM enters electric typewriters
description: IBM buys an electric typewriter company and strengthens its office-machinery business.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: IBM wins Social Security contract
description: IBM provides tabulating equipment for the U.S. Social Security program, a major government project.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Harvard Mark I is completed
description: IBM's work with Harvard produces the Mark I, a landmark electromechanical computer.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Thomas Watson Jr. becomes president
description: A generational leadership shift begins as IBM pushes further into electronic computing.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: RAMAC introduces hard-disk storage
description: IBM's RAMAC system brings the first commercial hard-disk drive to market.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: System/360 is announced
description: IBM unveils the System/360 mainframe family, one of the most influential product lines in computing history.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Software is unbundled from hardware
description: IBM separately prices software and services, helping create an independent software industry.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: IBM PC launches
description: IBM enters the personal-computer market with the IBM Personal Computer.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: PC XT extends the PC line
description: IBM expands its personal-computer offerings as the PC ecosystem grows rapidly.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Lou Gerstner becomes CEO
description: Gerstner leads a major turnaround and keeps IBM together rather than breaking it up.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Deep Blue defeats Garry Kasparov
description: IBM's Deep Blue wins a chess match against world champion Garry Kasparov.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: PwC Consulting is acquired
description: IBM expands its services business by acquiring PricewaterhouseCoopers Consulting.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: PC division is sold to Lenovo
description: IBM exits most of the consumer PC business by selling the division to Lenovo.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Watson wins Jeopardy!
description: IBM's Watson system defeats top human champions on the quiz show Jeopardy!, bringing new attention to AI.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: x86 server business is sold
description: IBM continues its shift away from commodity hardware by selling its x86 server business to Lenovo.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Red Hat acquisition closes
description: IBM completes its acquisition of Red Hat, strengthening its hybrid-cloud strategy.

timeline_description: A timeline of IBM from its punch-card and tabulating roots to its evolution into a global computing and enterprise technology company.
title: Kyndryl spin-off is completed
description: IBM spins off its managed infrastructure services unit as Kyndryl.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel is founded
description: Robert Noyce and Gordon Moore incorporate the company that becomes Intel, soon joined by Andy Grove.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Company adopts the Intel name
description: The new venture formally takes the name Intel, short for Integrated Electronics.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel 1103 DRAM ships
description: Intel introduces the 1103, the first commercially successful DRAM chip.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel 4004 microprocessor debuts
description: Intel releases the 4004, widely recognized as the first commercial microprocessor.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel 8008 expands microprocessor capabilities
description: The 8008 extends Intel's position in the emerging microprocessor market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel 8080 launches
description: The 8080 becomes one of the foundational chips of early personal computing.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel 8086 is introduced
description: The 8086 creates the x86 architecture lineage that later dominates personal computing.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: IBM PC adopts an Intel processor
description: IBM selects the Intel 8088 for its personal computer, greatly increasing Intel's influence.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel pivots toward microprocessors
description: Under Andy Grove, Intel shifts away from memory chips and concentrates on microprocessors.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: 486 processor ships
description: Intel releases the 486, an important performance step in the PC era.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Intel Inside campaign begins
description: The Intel Inside marketing program helps make the chip maker a household name.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Pentium launches
description: Intel debuts the Pentium processor, a defining brand of the 1990s PC market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Pentium II arrives
description: Intel continues rapid PC-era product iteration with the Pentium II generation.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Centrino platform is launched
description: Intel introduces Centrino, accelerating growth in mobile computing and Wi-Fi laptops.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Apple announces move to Intel Macs
description: Apple reveals that future Macintosh computers will use Intel processors.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Core architecture takes over
description: Intel launches the Core processor line, improving performance and energy efficiency.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Tri-Gate transistor era begins
description: Intel introduces 3-D Tri-Gate transistor technology for advanced process nodes.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Altera acquisition expands FPGA business
description: Intel acquires Altera to deepen its position in programmable chips and data-center markets.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: IDM 2.0 strategy is announced
description: Intel unveils IDM 2.0, combining internal manufacturing, external foundry use, and new foundry services.

timeline_description: A timeline of Intel from its founding in Silicon Valley to its role as a leading chip designer and manufacturer.
title: Meteor Lake launches new chiplet generation
description: Intel ships Meteor Lake processors, highlighting a modular design approach and AI-focused PC features.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alibaba is founded
description: Jack Ma and 17 partners establish Alibaba in Hangzhou to connect Chinese suppliers with overseas buyers.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Early international investment arrives
description: Alibaba secures early backing from investors including SoftBank and Goldman Sachs.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alibaba becomes profitable
description: The company reports profitability roughly three years after launch.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Taobao is launched
description: Alibaba creates Taobao to enter China's consumer e-commerce market.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alipay is created
description: Alibaba launches Alipay to support secure online payments for e-commerce transactions.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Yahoo strategic deal is signed
description: Alibaba forms a major partnership with Yahoo and takes over China Yahoo operations.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alibaba.com goes public in Hong Kong
description: Alibaba.com's IPO gives the group a prominent public-market presence.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Taobao Mall is launched
description: Alibaba creates Taobao Mall, the platform later rebranded as Tmall.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alibaba Cloud begins operations
description: Alibaba launches Alibaba Cloud, expanding beyond e-commerce into cloud computing.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Singles' Day becomes a flagship shopping event
description: Alibaba turns November 11 into a major annual e-commerce festival through its marketplaces.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: AliExpress expands cross-border retail
description: Alibaba grows its international consumer marketplace with AliExpress.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Alipay restructuring causes controversy
description: Control of Alipay is shifted in a move that sparks debate among investors and partners.

timeline_description: A timeline of Alibaba Group from its start as a Chinese business-to-business marketplace to its growth into a major e-commerce and cloud company.
title: Cainiao is established
description: Alibaba helps create Cainiao to build out logistics infrastructure for Chinese e-commerce.

timeline_description: A timeline of Saudi Aramco from the first Saudi oil concession to its rise as a state-owned global energy giant.
